skills.name: autoplan
skills.description: Auto-review pipeline — reads the full CEO, design, eng, and DX review skills from disk and runs them sequentially with auto-decisions using 6 decision principles. (gstack)

skills.name: benchmark
skills.description: Performance regression detection using the browse daemon. (gstack)

skills.name: benchmark-models
skills.description: Cross-model benchmark for gstack skills. (gstack)

skills.name: browse
skills.description: Fast headless browser for QA testing and site dogfooding. (gstack)

skills.name: canary
skills.description: Post-deploy canary monitoring. (gstack)

skills.name: careful
skills.description: Safety guardrails for destructive commands. (gstack)

skills.name: codex
skills.description: OpenAI Codex CLI wrapper — three modes. (gstack)

skills.name: context-restore
skills.description: Restore working context saved earlier by /context-save. (gstack)

skills.name: context-save
skills.description: Save working context. (gstack)

skills.name: cso
skills.description: Chief Security Officer mode. (gstack)

skills.name: design-consultation
skills.description: Design consultation: understands your product, researches the landscape, proposes a complete design system (aesthetic, typography, color, layout, spacing, motion), and generates font+color preview... (gstack)

skills.name: design-html
skills.description: Design finalization: generates production-quality Pretext-native HTML/CSS. (gstack)

skills.name: design-review
skills.description: Designer's eye QA: finds visual inconsistency, spacing issues, hierarchy problems, AI slop patterns, and slow interactions — then fixes them. (gstack)

skills.name: design-shotgun
skills.description: Design shotgun: generate multiple AI design variants, open a comparison board, collect structured feedback, and iterate. (gstack)

skills.name: devex-review
skills.description: Live developer experience audit. (gstack)

skills.name: diagram
skills.description: Turn an English description (or mermaid source) into a diagram triplet: the source, an editable .excalidraw file you can open (gstack)

skills.name: document-generate
skills.description: Generate missing documentation from scratch for a feature, module, or entire project. (gstack)

skills.name: document-release
skills.description: Post-ship documentation update. (gstack)

skills.name: freeze
skills.description: Restrict file edits to a specific directory for the session. (gstack)

skills.name: gstack
skills.description: Router for the gstack skill suite. (gstack)

skills.name: gstack-openclaw-ceo-review
skills.description: Use when asked to review a plan, challenge a proposal, run a CEO review, poke holes in an approach, think bigger about scope, or decide whether to expand or reduce the plan.

skills.name: gstack-openclaw-investigate
skills.description: Use when asked to debug, fix a bug, investigate an error, or do root cause analysis, and when users report errors, stack traces, unexpected behavior, or say something stopped working.

skills.name: gstack-openclaw-office-hours
skills.description: Use when asked to brainstorm, evaluate whether an idea is worth building, run office hours, or think through a new product idea or design direction before any code is written.

skills.name: gstack-openclaw-retro
skills.description: Weekly engineering retrospective. Analyzes commit history, work patterns, and code quality metrics with persistent history and trend tracking. Team-aware with per-person contributions, praise, and growth areas. Use when asked for weekly retro, what shipped this week, or engineering retrospective.

skills.name: gstack-upgrade
skills.description: Upgrade gstack to the latest version.

skills.name: guard
skills.description: Full safety mode: destructive command warnings + directory-scoped edits. (gstack)

skills.name: hackernews-frontpage
skills.description: Scrape the Hacker News front page (titles, points, comment counts).

skills.description: Code quality dashboard. (gstack)

skills.name: investigate
skills.description: Systematic debugging with root cause investigation. (gstack)

skills.description: Autonomous iOS bug fixer. (gstack)

skills.description: Live-device iOS QA for SwiftUI apps. (gstack)

skills.description: Manage project learnings.

skills.description: Turn any markdown file into a publication-quality PDF. (gstack)

skills.description: YC Office Hours — two modes. (gstack)

skills.description: Launch GStack Browser — AI-controlled Chromium with the sidebar extension baked in.

skills.description: Configure deployment settings for /land-and-deploy.

skills.name: setup-gbrain
skills.description: Set up gbrain for this coding agent: install the CLI, initialize a local PGLite or Supabase brain, register MCP, capture per-remote trust policy. (gstack)

skills.description: Codify the most recent successful /scrape flow into a permanent browser-skill on disk. (gstack)

skills.name: sync-gbrain
skills.description: Keep gbrain current with this repo's code and refresh agent search guidance in CLAUDE.md. Wraps the gstack-gbrain-sync orchestrator with state (gstack)

skills.description: Clear the freeze boundary set by /freeze, allowing edits to all directories again. (gstack)
